requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — GOST IEC 62133 under TR CU 004/2011
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——TR CU 004/2011下的GOST IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——TR CU 004/2011下的GOST IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Armenian (EAEU) market must meet the safety essential requirements of TR CU 004/2011 (safety of low-voltage equipment). The technical basis is the adopted GOST IEC 62133 series (GOST IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems), the EAEU national adoption of IEC 62133-2 covering abuse testing — overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and forced discharge — and electrochemical performance limits. Conformity is demonstrated by testing at an accredited EAEU laboratory and issuance of a certificate or declaration of conformity, after which the EAC mark is affixed. A test report produced solely against the Chinese GB standard is not accepted under the EAEU conformity-assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 投放亚美尼亚（EAEU）市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须满足TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全）的安全基本要求。技术基础为采用版GOST IEC 62133系列（锂系统适用GOST IEC 62133-2），即IEC 62133-2的EAEU国家采用版，涵盖滥用测试——过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及强制放电——及电化学性能限值。合格评定通过EAEU认可实验室的检测并签发合格证书或声明完成，之后加贴EAC标志。仅依据中国GB标准出具的检测报告在EAEU合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 投放亞美尼亞（EAEU）市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須滿足TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全）的安全基本要求。技術基礎為採用版GOST IEC 62133系列（鋰系統適用GOST IEC 62133-2），即IEC 62133-2的EAEU國家採用版，涵蓋濫用測試——過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電——及電化學性能限值。合格評定通過EAEU認可實驗室的檢測並簽發合格證書或聲明完成，之後加貼EAC標誌。僅依據中國GB標準出具的檢測報告在EAEU合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (EAEU / Customs Union Technical Regulation)

GOST IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (EAEU adoption of IEC 62133-2)
IEC 62133-2 — international base standard adopted as GOST IEC 62133-2

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287-2013 (mobile phone lithium-ion batteries) for specific products. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by EAEU accredited bodies, because the EAEU conformity-assessment pathway requires testing against the adopted GOST IEC 62133 series by an EAEU-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），特定产品适用GB 18287-2013（手机锂离子电池）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，不被EAEU认可机构认可，因为EAEU合格评定路径要求由EAEU认可实验室依据采用版GOST IEC 62133系列进行检测。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），特定產品適用GB 18287-2013（手機鋰離子電池）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，不被EAEU認可機構認可，因為EAEU合格評定路徑要求由EAEU認可實驗室依據採用版GOST IEC 62133系列進行檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Although GB 31241 and GOST IEC 62133-2 share IEC 62133-2 as a common root, they are not mutually recognised. Key gaps for Chinese exporters to Armenia: (1) testing must be performed or accepted by an EAEU-accredited laboratory against the adopted GOST IEC 62133 series, not GB 31241; (2) the EAEU pathway issues a certificate or declaration of conformity and the EAC mark, with no Chinese counterpart document; (3) marking, labelling, and accompanying-documentation language requirements differ (Russian-language documentation is commonly required across the EAEU). An existing GB 31241 report may support engineering analysis but does not by itself establish EAEU conformity.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 31241与GOST IEC 62133-2共享IEC 62133-2为共同来源，二者并不互认。中国出口商出口至亚美尼亚的主要差距：（1）检测须由EAEU认可实验室依据采用版GOST IEC 62133系列进行或接受，而非GB 31241；（2）EAEU路径签发合格证书或声明及EAC标志，无中国对应文件；（3）标识、标签及随附文件语言要求不同（EAEU普遍要求俄文文件）。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但本身不能证明EAEU符合性。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 31241與GOST IEC 62133-2共享IEC 62133-2為共同來源，二者並不互認。中國出口商出口至亞美尼亞的主要差距：（1）檢測須由EAEU認可實驗室依據採用版GOST IEC 62133系列進行或接受，而非GB 31241；（2）EAEU路徑簽發合格證書或聲明及EAC標誌，無中國對應文件；（3）標識、標籤及隨附文件語言要求不同（EAEU普遍要求俄文文件）。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但本身不能證明EAEU符合性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — TR CU 004/2011 safety requirements apply before EAEU / Armenian market placement; the adopted GOST IEC 62133-2 series is the technical basis, evidenced by a certificate or declaration of conformity and the EAC mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Armenian / EAEU market placement requires compliance with TR CU 004/2011, evidenced via an accredited-body certificate or declaration of conformity and the EAC mark, on a GOST IEC 62133-2 testing basis. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the EAEU conformity-assessment file, even though both trace to IEC 62133-2, so exporters should arrange EAEU-accepted testing and documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入亚美尼亚/EAEU市场须符合TR CU 004/2011，并在GOST IEC 62133-2检测基础上，以认可机构签发的合格证书或声明及EAC标志为凭证。即使GB 31241与GOST IEC 62133-2同源于IEC 62133-2，中国GB 31241认证本身仍不能满足EAEU合格评定文件，因此出口商应安排EAEU接受的检测和文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞美尼亞/EAEU市場須符合TR CU 004/2011，並在GOST IEC 62133-2檢測基礎上，以認可機構簽發的合格證書或聲明及EAC標誌為憑證。即使GB 31241與GOST IEC 62133-2同源於IEC 62133-2，中國GB 31241認證本身仍不能滿足EAEU合格評定文件，因此出口商應安排EAEU接受的檢測和文件。

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — TR CU 004/2011 on safety of low-voltage equipment
